sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Helpful answers about using Spellvault as your MTG Price Tracker App.

items.title: What is an MTG price tracker?
items.description: An MTG price tracker helps you follow card values over time, so you can understand movement, trends, and changes across your collection.

items.title: How is an MTG price tracker different from an MTG price checker?
items.description: A price checker gives you a quick value right now. A price tracker helps you understand how prices move over time and what those changes mean.

items.title: Can Spellvault track total MTG collection value?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault helps you follow both individual card movement and the combined value of your full collection.

items.title: Can I track specific MTG cards over time?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault makes it easier to keep an eye on important cards instead of relying on one isolated price lookup.

items.title: Does Spellvault help me spot selling or trading opportunities?
items.description: Yes. Price movement is more useful when it is connected to the copies you own, which helps you decide what deserves action.

items.title: Can I see duplicates while tracking card prices?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault keeps price tracking tied to your collection, so duplicate visibility and price movement work together.

items.title: Is Spellvault useful for collectors, sellers, and stores?
items.description: Yes. Anyone managing real MTG inventory can benefit from tracking value over time instead of checking price only when it becomes urgent.

items.title: Why is price tracking better than a spreadsheet alone?
items.description: A spreadsheet can store numbers, but Spellvault keeps pricing connected to card identity, duplicates, locations, and the rest of your collection workflow.
